description: Drones capture aerial data and generate GIS maps, 3D models, DEMs, and DTMs for mining operations.
impact_metrics: Up to 350x more data points compared to traditional surveys
india_relevance: Supports optimization of large mining sites across India

description: Drone surveys calculate stockpile volumes using machine learning and aerial imagery.
impact_metrics: Improved inventory management and financial reporting
india_relevance: Useful for mining audits and production monitoring

description: Drone-generated GIS maps assist in haul road design, traffic optimization, and safety planning.
india_relevance: Enhances productivity in Indian mining operations
